Here is a short professional outreach message:

"Hi [Client Name], 

I came across your profile on [Platform] and was impressed by your work in [industry/niche]. As a seasoned developer, I'd like to introduce you to our team's expertise in building high-performance web, app, or AI solutions. Our goal is to help businesses like yours drive innovation and growth. Let's connect to explore how we can help you achieve your goals.

Best regards, [Your Name]"

This message:

* Is under 80 words
* Is personal and relevant by mentioning the client's profile and industry/niche
* Has no spam tone
* Clearly communicates the value proposition of offering high-quality development services
* Ends with a soft call to action ("Let's connect...")
